title: coelogyne tricallosa
intro: Coelogyne tricallosa, also known as the three-banded coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne tricallosa are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
